description: A traditional Mexican breakfast of fried eggs served on lightly fried or warmed tortillas and topped with a tomato-chili salsa. Beans, avocado, or cheese are common additions.
preparation_steps: Warm or lightly fry the tortillas.
Place the eggs over the tortillas.
Top with salsa and any optional additions.

health_advice.benefits: Can be a balanced breakfast with protein, tortillas, and vegetables from salsa or sides.
health_advice.risks: Calories and sodium increase with large amounts of cheese, oil, or refried beans prepared with added fat.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use a fresh salsa and include beans or avocado in moderate portions for a more satisfying meal.

dietary_notes.note: Classic huevos rancheros is vegetarian but not vegan because of eggs. Vegan versions can use tofu or plant-based egg alternatives. Corn tortillas are often gluten-free.

allergens: Possible dairy if cheese is added
